site.title: Blue's collection of stuff
site.tagline: Blue's little hoard of tools, like a shed
site.intro: This is a place where a lot of my projects lives! Anything from art to writing, programming to research, photography to blogs.
site.about: Want to say hi, leave feedback, or point me toward something interesting? You can read more about me, reach out directly, or drop a note through the feedback form.
site.editorDescription: Manage site copy and posts here. Saving writes directly to data/content.json.
